title: Bounded Worker Pool, Origin Fairness, Cancellation, and Shutdown · Language Lens: Feed Go Shutdown Join
summary: The scheduler launches one goroutine per source, results block after cancellation, one origin occupies all workers, panics leak claims, and shutdown exits before commits settle. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go shutdown join increment in bounded origin-aware ingestion worker pool. Learners progress through prediction, explicit…
objectives: Stop claims, cancel fetches, bound drain time, join workers, finalize or abandon leases safely, close pools, and report incomplete work.
Convert controlled worker failure into claimed-job evidence, preserve cause, release or expire ownership, and keep the pool observable.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
